Operation 'updateLayer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely empty. data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing layer within a template. Accepts partial updates via the CreateLayer schema - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Layer object with all current properties. Changes to layer properties will affect all variants using this template.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Added context about partial update support, return value, and important side effect that layer changes impact variants. This helps AI agents understand the scope and consequences of the operation.

message: Operation 'deleteLayer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added clarification about soft delete behavior, impact on existing variants, and response status. This helps AI agents understand the non-destructive nature and implications of the operation.

data.description_suggestion: Soft deletes a layer from a template, marking it as deleted without removing it from the database. The layer will no longer be rendered in new variants, but existing variants retain their layer overrides. Returns a 204 No Content response on success.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added clarification about soft delete behavior, impact on existing variants, and response status. This helps AI agents understand the non-destructive nature and implications of the operation.
